title: Charred Chewy Indian Shiitake Mushrooms Baingan Bharta
description: A hearty and comforting Indian dish featuring charred and chewy shiitake mushrooms in a rich and smoky eggplant sauce, perfect for a sick day. This dish is nut-free and made using a bain-marie for gentle heating.
instructions: Char the eggplant over an open flame or in the oven until the skin is blackened and blistered.
Peel the charred eggplant and chop it into small pieces.
Heat the ghee or oil in a pan over medium heat and saute the onion until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sliced shiitake mushrooms to the pan and cook until they are tender and chewy.
Stir in the tomato puree, salt, and garam masala, and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and add the chopped eggplant to the pan, stirring to combine.
Use a bain-marie to gently heat the mixture over low heat for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve hot.
